senses.gloss: the soft fluffy outgrowths that make up the coat of hatchlings (like chicks) or the under-feathers of full-grown birds, down, fluff, fuzz

the soft fluffy outgrowths that make up the coat of hatchlings (like chicks) or the under-feathers of full-grown birds, down, fluff, fuzz; any downlike fuzzy covering (like the hair of a human baby or the hairlike outgrowths of some plants)
